html:
AMD Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (~$337.11) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$337.11 | Entry Zone: $260–280

Technicals

  • Price is in a parabolic vertical ascent, significantly extended above the long-term diagonal trend channel.
  • RSI is in extreme overbought territory (above 70), suggesting momentum exhaustion may be approaching.
  • The current price action shows a 'blow-off top' structure with nearly vertical slope over the last month.
  • Oscillator purple line is well above the orange signal line, confirming extreme bullish momentum but high risk of mean reversion.

News & Financials

  • Strong market sentiment driven by AI-related data center growth and MI300 accelerator adoption.
  • High valuation multiples compared to historical averages, requiring perfect execution on upcoming earnings.
  • Benefiting from broader semiconductor sector rotation and 'AI-fever' in the equity markets.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a pullback to the broken upper diagonal trendline or the $280 consolidation area.
  • Risk: Extreme downside risk if momentum shifts, as the price is far from established support levels.
  • Action: Hold the current 3.5% allocation. Do not add at these levels due to the parabolic extension. Consider trimming a small portion (e.g., 0.5%) to lock in gains if the RSI begins to cross back below the orange signal line.

html:
BE Bloom Energy Corporation (~$287.97) HIGH RISK

⇗ Top

Price: ~$287.97 | Entry Zone: $180–210

Technicals

  • Price has experienced a massive, near-vertical breakout above the established diagonal resistance trendline, indicating an overextended state.
  • RSI is significantly elevated, showing the asset is deep in overbought territory.
  • The recent price action has decoupled from the previous trend channel, suggesting a potential blow-off top or parabolic exhaustion.
  • No recent 'Buy' signals are present; the last signal was a 'Buy' near the lower trendline support, which has since been far surpassed.

News & Financials

  • The stock is showing extreme volatility with a single-day gain of over 27%, which is often unsustainable without immediate fundamental catalysts.
  • As a clean energy technology company, the stock is highly sensitive to interest rate expectations and government policy, which can lead to rapid sentiment shifts.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for a retest of the previous resistance trendline (now potential support) near the 200-210 level.
  • Risk: Very high due to the parabolic move; risk of a sharp mean reversion to the trendline is significant.
  • Action: Given the 1.1% allocation, consider taking partial profits to lock in gains from this parabolic move, or hold with a trailing stop-loss to protect against a rapid reversal.

Technicals

  • A recent 'Sell' signal dot appeared at the local peak near $440, followed by a price decline.
  • The oscillator purple line has crossed below the orange line and is trending downward toward the 40 level.
  • Price action is currently in a corrective phase, breaking the previous steep bullish trend structure.
  • The chart shows a lack of immediate bullish momentum as the price consolidates below recent highs.

News & Financials

  • Gold prices are heavily influenced by US Federal Reserve interest rate expectations and real yields.
  • Ongoing geopolitical instability continues to support gold's status as a safe-haven asset.
  • Strong demand from global central banks has provided a significant macro tailwind for the metal.

Assessment

  • Buy level: Wait for the oscillator to reach the oversold zone (near 20-30) and a bullish crossover (purple over orange) accompanied by a 'Buy' signal dot.
  • Risk: Potential for further downside toward the $380 support level if the US Dollar strengthens or interest rates remain higher for longer.
  • Action: Hold the current 2.7% allocation. Do not add more shares at this level as the technical indicators suggest the current correction may have more room to run before a bottom is formed.
